data.text: I’ll use the HELIX/DDx execution context here and first inspect the target page, existing worker dispatch UI, and the e2e screenshot setup before touching files.

The repo has unrelated generated skill-tree changes already present, so I’ll leave those alone and stage only the UI/test/screenshot files I touch. The first search was too broad because execution logs contain old session output; I’m narrowing to the frontend package now.
The e2e contract is already written for US-095, so I’m treating it as the executable spec and reading it alongside the existing project page and GraphQL helpers.

I’ve got the shape now: the project overview route is currently only a redirect, while `queueSummary`, `workerDispatch`, `ConfirmDialog`, and `Tooltip` already exist. I’m going to replace the redirect with a real overview/action surface and wire screenshots to that route.
The first implementation pass is in place. I’m running the focused Svelte check and US-095 e2e now; if Svelte 5 or Playwright exposes any rough edge, I’ll tighten it before taking screenshots.

The frontend dependencies are not installed in this worktree, so the first verification attempt failed before reaching our code (`svelte-kit` and `@playwright/test` missing). I’m installing the package dependencies locally, then I’ll rerun the focused checks.
The build contains the new route, but the browser still lands somewhere without the Actions region. I’m going to inspect the rendered page state directly instead of guessing from the locator failure.

The page was crashing before render because `bits-ui` tooltip now requires a `Tooltip.Provider`; the disabled action card mounts a tooltip immediately. I’m fixing the shared tooltip wrapper so the Actions panel can render and the disabled-state tooltip works.

The remaining failures are now ordinary UI semantics: the dialog close button was matching `/start/`, and native disabled buttons suppress the hover event needed by tooltip triggers. I’m switching the close label to a neutral dialog label and using ARIA-disabled for the tooltip-wrapped disabled action.

The Bits tooltip wrapper still is not opening when the Playwright hover targets the nested disabled action. I’m replacing that wrapper with a small local tooltip implementation that preserves the same component API and emits a real `role="tooltip"` on hover/focus.
US-095 is now green. I’m doing one clean type-check pass after the tooltip type fix, then I’ll generate the project-overview light and dark screenshot baselines.
The project-overview light and dark baselines were generated. I’m formatting only the touched frontend files, then I’ll rerun the final focused acceptance test and inspect the exact staged diff.
The screenshots render correctly. I’m making one small layout cleanup before final baselines: the Actions region should be the page section, with only the repeated action items framed as cards.

The final focused checks are green: `e2e/actions.spec.ts` is 5/5, project-overview screenshots are updated in both themes, and `bun run check` has 0 errors with existing Svelte warnings. I’m staging only the intended frontend files and screenshots now.

Implemented and committed `ddx-c825fd8b`.

Commit: `cadec756 feat(web-ui): add project actions panel [ddx-c825fd8b]`

Verification:
- `bunx playwright test e2e/actions.spec.ts` passed, 5/5
- `bunx playwright test e2e/screenshots.spec.ts -g "project-overview" --update-snapshots` passed, light and dark baselines added
- `bun run check` passed with 0 errors; existing Svelte warnings remain

Note: unrelated pre-existing `.agents/skills/*` and `.claude/skills/*` worktree changes are still unstaged and were not included.
